description: The WorldPermissions component controls various actions the selected roles can do in the world.

fields.AllowSavingItems: Whether the selected roles can save items.
fields.AllowTransferingObjectsOut: Whether the selected roles can smuggle items out.
fields.AllowSpawningObjects: Whether the selected roles can spawn objects.
fields.AllowSwappingAvatars: Whether the selected roles can swap into a different avatar.
fields.SaveCopyPermission: When can the selected roles save the world?
